Scratch.description: Hard, pointed, sharp claws rake the target to inflict damage.

Growl.description: The user growls in an endearing way, lowering the target's Attack stat.

Ember.description: The target is attacked with small flames. This may also leave the target with a burn.

Smokescreen.description: The user releases an obscuring cloud of smoke or ink, sharply lowering the target's accuracy.

Dragon Breath.description: The user exhales a mighty gust of dragon energy. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

Fire Fang.description: The user bites with fiery fangs. This may also make the target flinch or leave it with a burn.

Slash.description: The target is attacked with a slash of claws, etc. This move has a high critical-hit ratio.

Flamethrower.description: The target is scorched with an intense blast of fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

Flame Burst.description: The user attacks the target with a bursting flame. The bursting flame damages Pokémon next to the target as well.

Fire Spin.description: The target becomes trapped within a fierce vortex of fire that rages for four to five turns.

Inferno.description: The user attacks by engulfing the target in an intense fire. This leaves the target with a burn.

Flare Blitz.description: The user cloaks itself in fire and charges at the target. This also damages the user and may leave the target with a burn.

Ancient Power.description: The user attacks with a prehistoric power. This may also raise all the user's stats at once.

Beat Up.description: The user gets all party Pokémon to attack. The more party Pokémon, the greater the number of attacks.

Body Slam.description: The user drops onto the target with its full body weight. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

Breaking Swipe.description: The user swings its tail or a similar appendage to strike the target and lower its Attack stat.

Brick Break.description: The user attacks with a swift chop. This can also break through barriers such as Light Screen and Reflect.

Crunch.description: The user crunches up the target with sharp fangs. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

Cut.description: The target is cut with a long, sharp blade or claw.

Dig.description: The user burrows into the ground, then attacks on the next turn. It can also be used to exit dungeons.

Dragon Claw.description: The user slashes the target with huge, sharp claws.

Dragon Dance.description: The user vigorously performs a mystic dance that raises its Attack and Speed stats.

Dragon Pulse.description: The target is attacked with a shock wave generated by the user's gaping mouth.

Dragon Tail.description: The target is struck with a tail so powerful that it knocks the target out of battle.

Echoed Voice.description: The user attacks the target with an echoing voice. If this move is used every turn, its power increases.

Endure.description: The user endures any attack, leaving it with at least 1 HP. Its chance of failing rises if used in succession.

Facade.description: This attack move doubles its power if the user is poisoned, burned, or paralyzed.

False Swipe.description: A restrained attack that prevents the target from fainting. The target is left with at least 1 HP.

Fire Blast.description: The target is attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

Fire Pledge.description: The user attacks by sending a column of fire toward the target. This move's power is boosted when combined with others.

Fire Punch.description: The target is punched with a fiery fist. This may also leave the target with a burn.

Flame Charge.description: Cloaking itself in flame, the user attacks the target. This also raises the user's Speed stat.

Fling.description: The user flings its held item at the target. The move's power and effects depend on the item.

Focus Blast.description: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashes its power. This may also lower the target's Special Defense.

Focus Punch.description: The user focuses its mind before launching a punch. This move fails if the user is hit before it is used.

Fury Cutter.description: The target is slashed with scythes or claws. This attack becomes more powerful with each successive hit.

Headbutt.description: The user sticks out its head and attacks. This may also make the target flinch.

Heat Wave.description: The user attacks by exhaling a hot breath on opposing Pokémon. This may also leave them with a burn.

Helping Hand.description: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.

Hone Claws.description: The user sharpens its claws to boost its Attack stat and accuracy.

Incinerate.description: The user attacks the target with fire. If the target is holding a Berry, it is destroyed and cannot be used.

Iron Tail.description: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

Mega Kick.description: The target is attacked by a powerful kick.

Mega Punch.description: The target is slugged by a punch thrown with great power.

Metal Claw.description: The target is raked with steel claws. This may also raise the user's Attack stat.

Outrage.description: The user rampages and attacks for two or three turns. The user then becomes confused.

Overheat.description: The user attacks at full power. The attack's recoil harshly lowers the user's Special Attack stat.

Power-Up Punch.description: The user attacks with a punch. This also raises the user's Attack stat.

Protect.description: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if used in succession.

Rest.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and heals any status conditions.

Roar.description: The target is scared off, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends the battle.

Rock Slide.description: Large boulders are hurled at opposing Pokémon. This may also make them flinch.

Rock Smash.description: The user attacks with a punch. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

Rock Tomb.description: The user hurls boulders at the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

Scary Face.description: The user frightens the target with a scary face to harshly lower its Speed stat.

Shadow Claw.description: The user attacks by slashing the target with claws made from shadows. This move has a high critical-hit ratio.

Sleep Talk.description: While it is asleep, the user randomly uses one of the moves it knows.

Strength.description: The target is slugged with a punch thrown with tremendous force.

Substitute.description: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

Sunny Day.description: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type moves.

Swift.description: Star-shaped rays are shot at opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

Swords Dance.description: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit. This sharply raises the user's Attack stat.

Take Down.description: A reckless full-body charge attack that also damages the user a little.

Temper Flare.description: The user attacks by breathing pure heat at the target. This move's power is doubled if the user was damaged this turn.

Tera Blast.description: The user attacks with energy from its Tera type. If the user has Terastallized, this move's type becomes the Tera type.

Thunder Punch.description: The target is punched with an electrified fist. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

Weather Ball.description: This move's type and power change depending on the weather at the time the move is used.

Will-O-Wisp.description: The user shoots a sinister flame at the target to inflict a burn.

Work Up.description: The user is roused, and its Attack and Special Attack stats are raised.

Belly Drum.description: The user maximizes its Attack stat but loses half of its max HP.

Bite.description: The target is bitten with viciously sharp fangs. This may also make the target flinch.

Counter.description: A retaliation move that counters any physical attack, inflicting double the damage taken.

Dragon Rage.description: This attack always inflicts 40 HP damage.

Dragon Rush.description: The user charges at the target with great force. This may also make the target flinch.

Wing Attack.description: The target is struck with wings or a similar appendage.

Blast Burn.description: The target is hit with a fiery explosion. The user can't move on the next turn.

Block.description: The user blocks the target's way with arms spread wide to prevent escape.

Air Slash.description: The user attacks with a blade of air. This may also make the target flinch.

Acrobatics.description: The user nimbly strikes the target. This attack does more damage if the user is not holding an item.

Aerial Ace.description: The user confounds the target with speed, then slashes. This attack never misses.

Air Cutter.description: The user launches razor-like wind to slash opposing Pokémon. This move has a high critical-hit ratio.

Blaze Kick.description: The user launches a fiery kick. This may also leave the target with a burn and has a high critical-hit ratio.

Brutal Swing.description: The user swings its body around violently to inflict damage on everything in its vicinity.

Bulldoze.description: The user strikes everything around it by stomping down on the ground. This lowers the Speed stats of those hit.

Double-Edge.description: A reckless, life-risking tackle. This also damages the user.

Dragon Cheer.description: The user raises its allies' morale with a cheering display. This raises their critical-hit ratio.

Earthquake.description: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes every Pokémon around it.

Fly.description: The user flies up high on the first turn, then strikes on the next turn.

Giga Impact.description: The user charges at the target using every bit of its power. The user can't move on the next turn.

Heat Crash.description: The user slams into the target with its flame-covered body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the power.

Hurricane.description: The user attacks by wrapping the target in a fierce wind. This may also confuse the target.

Hyper Beam.description: The target is attacked with a powerful beam. The user can't move on the next turn.

Mystical Fire.description: The user attacks by breathing a special, hot fire. This also lowers the target's Special Attack stat.

Ominous Wind.description: The user blasts the target with a gust of repulsive wind. This may also raise all the user's stats at once.

Roost.description: The user lands and rests its body. This move restores the user's HP by up to half of its max HP.

Sandstorm.description: A five-turn sandstorm is summoned to damage all Pokémon on the field, except Rock, Ground, and Steel types.

Schorching Sands.description: The user throws scorching sand at the target to attack. This may also leave the target with a burn.

Sky Drop.description: The user takes the target into the sky on the first turn, then drops it on the next. The target cannot attack while in the sky.

Solar Beam.description: The user gathers light energy on the first turn, then fires a powerful beam on the next turn.

Steel Wing.description: The target is hit with wings of steel. This may also raise the user's Defense stat.

Twister.description: The user whips up a violent, twisting wind to tear into the target. This may also make the target flinch.

Tackle.description: A physical attack in which the user charges and slams into the target with its whole body.

Water Gun.description: The target is blasted with a forceful shot of water.

Jaw Lock.description: This move prevents the user and the target from switching out until either of them faints. The effect goes away if either of the Pokémon leaves the field.

Liquidation.description: The user slams into the target using a full-force blast of water. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

Assurance.description: This move's power is doubled if the target has already taken some damage in the same turn.

Chilling Water.description: The user attacks the target by showering it with water that's so cold it saps the target's power. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.

Dive.description: The user dives on the first turn, then floats up and attacks on the next turn.

Gastro Acid.description: The user hurls up its stomach acids on the target. The fluid eliminates the effect of the target's Ability.

Hydro Pump.description: The target is blasted by a huge volume of water launched under great pressure.

Ice Fang.description: The user bites with cold-infused fangs. This may also make the target flinch or leave it frozen.

Mud Shot.description: The user attacks by hurling a blob of mud at the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

Payback.description: The user stores power, then attacks. This move's power is doubled if the user moves after the target.

Poison Jab.description: The target is stabbed with a tentacle, an arm, or the like steeped in poison. This may also poison the target.

Rain Dance.description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

Revenge.description: This attack move's power is doubled if the user has been hurt by the opponent in the same turn.

Skitter Smack.description: The user skitters behind the target to attack. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

Stomping Tantrum.description: Driven by frustration, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.

Surf.description: The user attacks everything around it by swamping its surroundings with a giant wave.

Waterfall.description: The user charges at the target and may make it flinch.

Water Pulse.description: The user attacks the target with a pulsing blast of water. This may also confuse the target.

Whirlpool.description: The user traps the target inside a violent, swirling whirlpool that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

Shell Smash.description: The user breaks its shell, which lowers its Defense and Sp. Def stats but sharply boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.

Skull Bash.description: The user tucks in its head to raise its Defense stat on the first turn, then rams the target on the next turn.

Razor Shell.description: The user cuts the target with sharp shells to inflict damage. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

Rock Polish.description: The user polishes its body to reduce drag. This sharply boosts the user's Speed stat.

Head Smash.description: The user attacks the target with a hazardous full-power headbutt. This also damages the user terribly.

Blizzard.description: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike opposing Pokémon. This may also leave the opposing Pokémon frozen.

Body Press.description: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. The higher the user's Defense stat, the greater the damage this move deals.

Earth Power.description: The user makes the ground under the target erupt with power. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

High Horsepower.description: The user fiercely attacks the target using its entire body.

Ice Spinner.description: The user covers its feet in thin ice and twirls around, slamming into the target. This move's spinning motion also destroys the terrain.

Iron Defense.description: The user hardens its body's surface like iron, sharply boosting its Defense stat.

Megahorn.description: Using its tough and impressive horn, the user rams into the target with no letup.

Meteor Beam.description: The user gathers energy from space and boosts its Sp. Atk stat on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn.

Muddy Water.description: The user attacks by shooting muddy water at opposing Pokémon. This may also lower their accuracy.

Rock Blast.description: The user attacks by hurling hard rocks at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

Sand Tomb.description: The user traps the target inside a harshly raging sandstorm that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

Smart Strike.description: The user stabs the target with a sharp horn. This attack never misses.

Stealth Rock.description: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the opposing team. The trap damages opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

Stone Edge.description: The user stabs the target with sharpened stones. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

Super Fang.description: The user chomps hard on the target with its sharp front fangs. This cuts the target's HP in half.

Superpower.description: The user attacks the target with great power. This also lowers the user's Attack and Defense stats.

Throat Chop.description: The user attacks the target's throat, and the resultant suffering prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.

Ice Beam.description: The target is struck with an icy-cold beam of energy. This may also leave the target frozen.

Pound.description: The target is physically pounded with a long tail, a foreleg, or the like.

Double Slap.description: The target is slapped repeatedly, back and forth, two to five times in a row.

Mirror Move.description: The user counters the target by mimicking the target's last move.

Peck.description: The target is jabbed with a sharply pointed beak or horn to inflict damage.

Baton Pass.description: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting and passes along any stat changes.

Feather Dance.description: The user covers the target's body with a mass of down that harshly lowers its Attack stat.

Teeter Dance.description: The user performs a wobbly dance that confuses every Pokémon around it.

Flatter.description: Flattery is used to confuse the target. However, this also boosts the target's Sp. Atk stat.

Revelation Dance.description: The user attacks the target by dancing with all its might. This move becomes the same type as the user's type.

Agility.description: The user relaxes and lightens its body to move faster. This sharply boosts its Speed stat.

Alluring Voice.description: The user attacks the target using its angelic voice. This also confuses the target if its stats have been boosted during the turn.

Attract.description: If the target is of the opposite gender to the user, it becomes infatuated with the user and will sometimes be unable to use its moves.

Calm Mind.description: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to boost its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

Captivate.description: If any opposing Pokémon is the opposite gender of the user, it is charmed, which harshly lowers its Sp. Atk stat.

Charm.description: The user gazes at the target rather charmingly, making it less wary. This harshly lowers the target's Attack stat.

Covet.description: The user endearingly approaches the target, then steals the target's held item.

Defog.description: A strong wind blows away the target's barriers such as Reflect or Light Screen. This also lowers the target's evasiveness.

Dual Wingbeat.description: The user slams the target with its wings to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.

Embargo.description: This move prevents the target from using its held item for five turns. Its Trainer is also prevented from using items on it.

Icy Wind.description: The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. This also lowers opposing Pokémon's Speed stats.

Pluck.description: The user attacks by pecking the target. If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

Psych Up.description: The user hypnotizes itself into copying any stat change made by the target.

Quash.description: The user suppresses the target and makes its move go last.

Reversal.description: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.

Role Play.description: The user mimics the target completely, copying the target's Ability.

Safeguard.description: The user creates a protective field that prevents status conditions for five turns.

Sky Attack.description: The user attacks the turn after using this move. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit and may also make the target flinch.

Tailwind.description: The user whips up a turbulent whirlwind that boosts the Speed stats of itself and its allies for four turns.

Taunt.description: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.

Trailblaze.description: The user attacks suddenly as if leaping out from tall grass. The user's nimble footwork boosts its Speed stat.

U-turn.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

Quiver Dance.description: The user lightly performs a beautiful, mystic dance. This boosts the user's Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats.

Focus Energy.description: The user takes a deep breath and focuses so that its future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits.

Quick Attack.description: The user lunges at the target to inflict damage, moving at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

Double Team.description: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to boost its evasiveness.

Quick Guard.description: The user protects itself and its allies from priority moves.

Endeavor.description: The user inflicts damage by cutting down the target's HP to roughly equal the user's HP.

Brave Bird.description: The user tucks in its wings and charges at a low altitude. This also damages the user quite a lot.

Mud-Slap.description: The user hurls mud in the target's face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy.

Thief.description: The user attacks and steals the target's held item simultaneously. The user can't steal anything if it already holds an item.

Boomburst.description: The user attacks everything around it with the destructive power of a terrible explosive sound.

Pursuit.description: The power of this attack move is doubled if it's used on a target that's switching out of battle.

Rage.description: As long as this move is in use, the power of rage raises the Attack stat each time the user is hit in battle.

Refresh.description: The user rests to cure itself of poisoning, a burn, or paralysis.

Supersonic.description: The user generates odd sound waves from its body that confuse the target.

Whirlwind.description: The target is blown away, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

Laser Focus.description: The user concentrates intensely. The attack on the next turn always results in a critical hit.

Transform.description: The user transforms into a copy of the target, right down to having the same move set.

Leer.description: The user gives opposing Pokémon an intimidating leer that lowers their Defense stats.

Odor Sleuth.description: Enables a Ghost-type target to be hit by Normal- and Fighting-type attacks. This also enables an evasive target to be hit.

Retaliate.description: The user takes revenge for a fainted ally. This move's power is boosted if an ally fainted in the previous turn.

Baby-Doll Eyes.description: The user stares at the target with its baby-doll eyes, which lowers the target's Attack stat. This move always goes first.

Play Rough.description: The user attacks by playing rough with the target. This may also lower the target's Attack stat.

Last Resort.description: This move can be used only after the user has used all the other moves it knows in the battle.

After You.description: The user helps the target and makes it use its move right after the user.

Hyper Voice.description: The user attacks by letting loose a horribly loud, resounding cry.

Psychic Fangs.description: The user attacks by biting the target with its psychic capabilities. This move can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

Shadow Ball.description: The user attacks by hurling a shadowy blob at the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

Shock Wave.description: The user strikes the target with a quick jolt of electricity. This attack never misses.

Snarl.description: The user yells as if it's ranting about something, which lowers the Sp. Atk stats of opposing Pokémon.

Thunderbolt.description: The user attacks the target with a strong electric blast. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

Thunder Fang.description: The user bites with electrified fangs. This may also make the target flinch or leave it with paralysis.

Thunder Wave.description: The user launches a weak jolt of electricity that paralyzes the target.

Uproar.description: The user attacks in an uproar for three turns. During that time, no Pokémon can fall asleep.

Wild Charge.description: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into the target. This also damages the user a little.

Howl.description: The user howls loudly to rouse itself and its allies. This boosts their Attack stats.

Lick.description: The user licks the target with a long tongue to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

Sand Attack.description: Sand is hurled in the target's face, lowering the target's accuracy.

Yawn.description: The user lets loose a huge yawn that lulls the target into falling asleep on the next turn.

Iron Head.description: The user slams the target with its steel-hard head. This may also make the target flinch.

Thunder.description: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the target to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

Gravity.description: Enables Flying types or Pokémon with the Levitate Ability to be hit by Ground-type moves for five turns. Moves that involve flying can't be used.

Light Screen.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from special moves for five turns.

Aurora Beam.description: The target is hit with a rainbow-colored beam. This may also lower the target's Attack stat.

Nature Power.description: This attack makes use of nature's power. Its effects vary depending on the user's environment.

Night Slash.description: The user slashes the target the instant an opportunity arises. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

Aromatherapy.description: The user releases a soothing scent that heals all status conditions affecting the user's party.

Horn Leech.description: The user drains the target's energy with its horns. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

Misty Terrain.description: This protects Pokémon on the ground from status conditions and halves damage from Dragon-type moves for five turns.

Ingrain.description: The user lays roots that restore its own HP every turn. Because the user is now rooted, it can't switch out.

Geomancy.description: The user absorbs energy on the first turn, then sharply boosts its Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats on the next turn.

Moonblast.description: Borrowing the power of the moon, the user attacks the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Atk stat.

Heal Pulse.description: The user emits a healing pulse that restores the target's HP by up to half its max HP.

Close Combat.description: The user fights the target up close, inflicting damage without guarding itself. This also lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats.

Dazzling Gleam.description: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.

Draining Kiss.description: The user steals the target's HP with a kiss. The user's HP is restored by over half the damage taken by the target.

Flash.description: The user flashes a bright light that cuts the target's accuracy.

Flash Cannon.description: The user gathers all its light energy and releases it at once. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

Grass Knot.description: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

Hail.description: The user summons a hailstorm lasting five turns. It damages all Pokémon except Ice types.

Misty Explosion.description: The user attacks everything around it and faints upon using this move. This move's power is boosted on Misty Terrain.

Psychic.description: The target is hit with a strong telekinetic force to inflict damage. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

Psyshock.description: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This move deals physical damage.

Reflect.description: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from physical moves for five turns.

Terrain Pulse.description: The user utilizes the energy of the terrain to attack. This move's type and power change depending on the terrain at the time the move is used.

Wonder Room.description: The user creates a bizarre area in which Pokémon's Defense and Sp. Def stats are swapped for five turns.

Zen Headbutt.description: The user focuses its willpower to its head and attacks the target. This may also make the target flinch.

Me First.description: The user cuts ahead of the target to copy and use the target's intended move with greater power. This move fails if it isn't used first.

Jump Kick.description: The user jumps up high, then strikes with a kick. If the kick misses, the user hurts itself.

Astonish.description: The user attacks the target by crying out in a startling fashion. This may also make the target flinch.

Hypnosis.description: The user employs hypnotic suggestion to make the target fall asleep.

Stomp.description: The user attacks by stomping on the target with a big foot. This may also make the target flinch.

Psyshield Bash.description: Cloaking itself in psychic energy, the user slams into the target. This also boosts the user's Defense stat.

Confuse Ray.description: The target is exposed to a sinister ray that causes confusion.

Imprison.description: If opposing Pokémon know any move also known by the user, they are prevented from using it.

Bounce.description: The user bounces up high on the first turn, then drops onto the target on the next turn. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

Charge Beam.description: The user attacks the target with an electric charge. The residual electricity may also boost the user's Sp. Atk stat.

Curse.description: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.

Dream Eater.description: The user eats the dreams of a sleeping target. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

Energy Ball.description: The user draws power from nature and fires it at the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

Entrainment.description: The user dances with an odd rhythm that compels the target to mimic it, making the target's Ability the same as the user's.

Future Sight.description: Two turns after this move is used, a hunk of psychic energy attacks the target.

Lunge.description: The user makes a lunge at the target, attacking with full force. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.

Magic Room.description: The user creates a bizarre area in which Pokémon's held items lose their effects for five turns.

Psybeam.description: The target is attacked with a peculiar ray. This may also confuse the target.

Signal Beam.description: The user attacks with a sinister beam of light. This may also confuse the target.

Skill Swap.description: The user employs its psychic power to exchange Abilities with the target.

Spite.description: The user unleashes its grudge on the move last used by the target by cutting 4 PP from it.

Stored Power.description: The user attacks the target with stored power. The more the user's stats are boosted, the greater the move's power.

Sucker Punch.description: This move enables the user to attack first. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.

Swagger.description: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, this also sharply boosts the target's Attack stat.

Trick.description: The user catches the target off guard and swaps the target's held item with its own.

Trick Room.description: The user creates a bizarre area in which slower Pokémon get to move first for five turns.

Disable.description: For four turns, the target will be unable to use whichever move it last used.

Double Kick.description: The user attacks by kicking the target twice in a row using two feet.

Extrasensory.description: The user attacks with an odd, unseeable power. This may also make the target flinch.

Mud Sport.description: The user kicks up mud on the battlefield. This weakens Electric-type moves for five turns.

Thrash.description: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

Expanding Force.description: The user attacks the target with its psychic power. When the ground is Psychic Terrain, this move's power is boosted and it damages all opposing Pokémon.

Psychic Noise.description: The user attacks the target with unpleasant sound waves. For two turns, the target is prevented from recovering HP through moves, Abilities, or held items.

Rock Throw.description: The user picks up and throws a small rock at the target to inflict damage.

Harden.description: The user stiffens all the muscles in its body to boost its Defense stat.

Smack Down.description: The user throws a stone or similar projectile to attack the target. If the target is in the air, it will be knocked down to the ground.

Acid Spray.description: The user attacks by spitting fluid that works to melt the target. This also harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

Venoshock.description: The user drenches the target in a special poisonous liquid. This move's power is doubled if the target is poisoned.

Self-Destruct.description: The user attacks everything around it by causing an explosion. The user faints upon using this move.

Power Gem.description: The user attacks with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.

Acid Armor.description: The user alters its cellular structure to liquefy itself, sharply boosting its Defense stat.

Sludge Wave.description: The user strikes everything around it by swamping the area with a giant sludge wave. This may also poison those it hits.

Explosion.description: The user attacks everything around it by causing a tremendous explosion. The user faints upon using this move.

Gunk Shot.description: The user shoots filthy garbage at the target to attack. This may also poison the target.

Sludge Bomb.description: The user hurls unsanitary sludge at the target to inflict damage. This may also poison the target.

Spikes.description: The user lays a trap of spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will damage opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

Toxic.description: A move that leaves the target badly poisoned. Its poison damage worsens every turn.

Toxic Spikes.description: The user lays a trap of poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will poison opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

Memento.description: The user faints. In return, the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats are harshly lowered.

Mortal Spin.description: The user performs a spin attack that can also eliminate the effects of such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed. This also poisons opposing Pokémon.

Spiky Shield.description: In addition to protecting the user from attacks, this move also damages any attacker that makes direct contact.

Chip Away.description: Looking for an opening, the user strikes consistently. The target's stat changes don't affect this attack's damage.

Screech.description: An earsplitting screech harshly lowers the target's Defense stat.

Dark Pulse.description: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with ill intent. This may also make the target flinch.

Torment.description: The user torments and enrages the target, making it incapable of using the same move twice in a row.

Lash Out.description: The user lashes out to vent its frustration toward the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's stats were lowered during this turn.

Aqua Tail.description: The user attacks by swinging its tail as if it were a vicious wave in a raging storm.

Avalanche.description: This move's power is doubled if the target has inflicted damage on the user in the same turn.

Foul Play.description: The user turns the target's strength against it. The higher the target's Attack stat, the greater the damage this move inflicts.

Hard Press.description: The target is crushed with an arm, a claw, or the like to inflict damage. The more HP the target has left, the greater the move's power.

Heavy Slam.description: The user slams into the target with its heavy body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the move's power.

Ice Punch.description: The target is attacked with an icy punch. This may also leave the target frozen.

Knock Off.description: The user slaps down the target's held item, making it unusable for that battle. This move does more damage if the target has a held item.

Low Kick.description: A powerful low kick that makes the target fall over. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

Rock Climb.description: The user attacks the target by smashing into it with incredible force. This may also confuse the target.

Powder Snow.description: The user attacks with a chilling gust of powdery snow. This may also leave opposing Pokémon frozen.

Bide.description: The user endures attacks for two turns, then strikes back to cause double the damage taken.

Fury Swipes.description: The user attacks by raking the target with claws, scythes, or the like. This move hits two to five times in a row.

Brine.description: This move's power is doubled if the target's HP is at half or less.

Frost Breath.description: The user attacks by blowing its cold breath on the target. This move always lands a critical hit.

Flail.description: The user flails about aimlessly to attack. The less HP the user has, the greater the move's power.

Snowscape.description: The user summons a snowstorm lasting five turns. This boosts the Defense stats of Ice types.

Sheer Cold.description: The target faints instantly. This move is less likely to hit the target if used by Pokémon other than Ice types.

Play Nice.description: The user and the target become friends, and the target loses its will to fight. This lowers the target's Attack stat.

Encore.description: The user compels the target to keep using the move it encored for three turns.

Icicle Spear.description: The user attacks by launching sharp icicles at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

X-Scissor.description: The user slashes at the target by crossing its scythes, claws, or the like as if they were a pair of scissors.

Aqua Jet.description: The user lunges at the target to inflict damage, moving at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

Icicle Crash.description: The user attacks by crashing large icicles onto the target. This may also make the target flinch.

Bug Bite.description: The user attacks by biting the target. If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

Electroweb.description: The user captures opposing Pokémon in an electric net to inflict damage. This also lowers their Speed stats.

String Shot.description: The user blows silk from its mouth that binds opposing Pokémon and harshly lowers their Speed stats.

Bulk Up.description: The user tenses its muscles to bulk up its body, boosting its Attack and Defense stats.

Confusion.description: The target is hit with a weak telekinetic force to inflict damage. This may also confuse the target.

Gust.description: A gust of wind is whipped up by wings and launched at the target to inflict damage.

Poison Powder.description: The user scatters a cloud of poisonous dust that poisons the target.

Camouflage.description: The user's type is changed depending on its environment, such as at water's edge, in grass, or in a cave.

Struggle Bug.description: The user attacks by struggling against opposing Pokémon. This also lowers their Sp. Atk stats.

Bug Buzz.description: The user vibrates to generate a damaging sound wave. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

Giga Drain.description: A nutrient-draining attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

Infestation.description: The target is infested and attacked for four to five turns. The target can't flee during this time.

Silver Wind.description: The target is attacked with powdery scales blown by the wind. This may also raise all the user's stats.

Leaf Storm.description: The user whips up a storm of leaves around the target. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

Growth.description: The user's body grows all at once, boosting the Attack and Sp. Atk stats.

Razor Leaf.description: Sharp-edged leaves are launched to slash at opposing Pokémon. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

Bullet Seed.description: The user attacks by forcefully shooting seeds at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

Grassy Glide.description: Gliding on the ground, the user attacks the target. This move always goes first on Grassy Terrain.

Seed Bomb.description: The user attacks by slamming a barrage of hard-shelled seeds down on the target from above.

Synthesis.description: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.

Telekinesis.description: The user makes the target float with its psychic power. The target is easier to hit for three turns.

Worry Seed.description: A seed that causes worry is planted on the target. It prevents sleep by making the target's Ability Insomnia.

Fissure.description: The user opens up a fissure in the ground and drops the target in. The target faints instantly if this attack hits.

Rollout.description: The user continually rolls into the target over five turns. This attack becomes more powerful each time it hits.

Mirror Shot.description: The user lets loose a flash of energy at the target from its polished body. This may also lower the target's accuracy.

Metal Burst.description: The user retaliates with much greater force against the opponent that last inflicted damage on it.

Metal Sound.description: A horrible sound like scraping metal harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

Gyro Ball.description: The user tackles the target with a high-speed spin. The slower the user is than the target, the greater the move's power.

Magnet Rise.description: The user levitates using electrically generated magnetism for five turns.

Dragon Ascent.description: The user attacks the target by dropping out of the sky at high speed. This also lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats.

Extreme Speed.description: The user charges the target at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

Bind.description: A long body, tentacles, or the like are used to bind and squeeze the target for four to five turns.

Cosmic Power.description: The user absorbs a mystical power from space to boost its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

Draco Meteor.description: Comets are summoned down from the sky onto the target. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

Scale Shot.description: The user attacks by shooting scales two to five times in a row. This move boosts the user's Speed stat but lowers its Defense stat.

Amnesia.description: The user temporarily empties its mind to forget its concerns. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Def stat.

Slack Off.description: The user slacks off, restoring its own HP by up to half its max HP.

Magic Coat.description: Moves like Leech Seed and moves that inflict status conditions are blocked by a barrier and reflected back to the user of those moves.

Pay Day.description: Coins are hurled at the target to inflict damage. Money is earned after the battle.

Psychic Terrain.description: This protects Pokémon on the ground from priority moves and powers up Psychic-type moves for five turns.

Recycle.description: The user recycles a held item that has been used in battle so it can be used again.

Snore.description: This attack can be used only if the user is asleep. The harsh noise may also make the target flinch.

Tri Attack.description: The user strikes with a simultaneous three-beam attack. This may also burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.

Belch.description: The user lets out a damaging belch at the target. The user must eat a held Berry to use this move.

Acid.description: Opposing Pokémon are attacked with a spray of harsh acid. This may also lower their Sp. Def stats.

Withdraw.description: The user withdraws its body into its hard shell, boosting its Defense stat.

Drain Punch.description: The user attacks with an energy-draining punch. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

Metronome.description: The user waggles a finger and stimulates its brain into randomly using nearly any move.

Nasty Plot.description: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

Scald.description: The user attacks by shooting boiling hot water at the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

Shell Side Arm.description: This move is either physical or special—whichever will inflict more damage. This may also poison the target.

Haze.description: The user creates a haze that eliminates every stat change among all the Pokémon engaged in battle.

Trump Card.description: The fewer PP this move has, the greater its power.

Chilly Reception.description: The user tells a chillingly bad joke before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting. This summons a snowstorm lasting five turns.

Eerie Spell.description: The user attacks with its tremendous psychic power. This also drains 3 PP from the move last used by the target.

Hex.description: This relentless attack does massive damage to a target affected by status conditions.

Low Sweep.description: The user makes a swift attack on the target's legs, which lowers the target's Speed stat.

Venom Drench.description: Opposing Pokémon are drenched in an odd poisonous liquid. This lowers the Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats of a poisoned target.

Defense Curl.description: The user curls up and boosts its Defense stat.

Poison Sting.description: The user stabs the target with a poisonous stinger to inflict damage. This may also poison the target.

Poison Tail.description: The user hits the target with its tail. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit and may also poison the target.

Pin Missile.description: The user attacks by shooting sharp spikes at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

Steel Roller.description: The user attacks while destroying the terrain. This move fails if the ground hasn't turned into a terrain.

Steamroller.description: The user crushes its target by rolling over the target with its rolled-up body. This may also make the target flinch.

Twineedle.description: The user damages the target twice in succession by jabbing it with two spikes. This may also poison the target.

Cross Poison.description: A slashing attack with a poisonous blade that may also poison the target. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

Snatch.description: The user steals the effects of any attempts to use a healing or stat-changing move.
